zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lygon於1512年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德時，他的父親Sir Richard Lygon22歲，母親Margaret Greville19歲。他於1529年與Eleanor Dennis在英國格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年9月29日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Lygon于1512年1月1日出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Richard Lygon22岁，母亲Margaret Greville19岁。他于1529年与Eleanor Dennis在英国格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1567年9月29日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Lygon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possiblyalso an Americanized form of German   Leisen  .

variants.name: Lison
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from Lison in Calvados and Jura, France.
Welsh and English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Leyshon  .
Slovak (Lisoň) and Polish (Lisoń): descriptive nickname for a bald man, from a derivative of lisý ‘bald’ (see Lis ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lygon was born on 1 January 1512, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Lygon, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Greville, was 19. He married Eleanor Dennis in 1529, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 29 September 1567, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lygon est né le 1 janvier 1512, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Lygon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Greville, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Dennis en 1529, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1567, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Lygon am 1. Januar 1512 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Lygon 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Greville 19. Er hat 1529 in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England Eleanor Dennis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1567 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Eleanor Dennis nel 1529, nel Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1567, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Lygonが1512年1月1日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Lygonは22歳，母Margaret Grevilleは19歳であった。1529年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムでEleanor Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1567年9月29日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Lygon(이)가 1512년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Lygon(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Greville(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 그루스스터실르 디람에서 Eleanor Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Lygon nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1512, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Lygon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Greville, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Dennis em 1529, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1567, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lygon родился 1 января 1512 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Lygon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Greville, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Dennis в 1529 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1567 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
